title: Amazon Category Scraper
description: Crawl an Amazon category/search URL and extract structured product data from every listing and detail page.

categoryUrl.title: Category / Search URL
categoryUrl.description: A valid Amazon category or search URL, e.g. https://www.amazon.in/s?i=toys&rh=n%3A1350380031

maxPages.title: Max Listing Pages
maxPages.description: Maximum number of paginated listing pages to crawl.

maxProducts.title: Max Products (optional)
maxProducts.description: Hard cap on total products extracted. Leave blank to scrape all found products.

locale.title: Locale
locale.description: Amazon locale used to set Accept-Language headers and derive currency code.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Proxy settings. Recommended: Apify Residential or SERP proxies to avoid bot-blocks.
